title: selaginella zartmanii
intro: Selaginella zartmanii, also known as Zartman's spikemoss, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, which is a type of vascular cryptogam. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella zartmanii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
